titleStmt.title: SII 17.608: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 608. (A.R. No. 563 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.

This record commences with the praśasti, Pūmādu puṇara etc., of Vikramachōḷa. The details of date mentioned viz., year, 4, Ṛishabha, śu. 3, Wednesday, Tiruvādirai, regularly correspond to 1122 A.D., May 10, ·66 ·53.

It records the price-deed (poruḷmāvaṟudi) pertaining to the gift of land by purchase for a tank to be called Neḍuṅguḷam, to the temple, from the Peruṅguṛi mahāsabhā of Tirunallūr, a brahmadēya in Vēḷā-nāḍu, in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu when they were assembled in Rājanārāyaṇan-tirumaṇḍapam, by Madhurāntakan Ponnambalakkūttan alias Poṟkōyilnambi Toṇḍaimānār of Arumbākkam in Maṇavil-kōṭṭam. The land was purchased for 100 kāśu given in gold currency of 32(1/2) kaḻañju equal in value to Rājarājan-māḍai was endowed in order to supply Śeṅkaḻunīr flower for the god.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu [ tanni] rupatu malar mannavar cūṭa ma[nniya] Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol cenṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅka meyyaṟan taḻaippa kaliṅkamiriya kaṭa
l malai naṭā(ṭā)tti valaṅkolāḻiRead valaṅkoḷāḻiva ṭai ḷaṅ vum Orukuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ cempon virasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari panmarāna tiripuvanaccakravattikaḷ vikkiramcoḻadevarkku yā
ṇṭu nālāvatu ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tṛtiyaiyum [ pudha] nkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvātirai nāḷ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu veḷā nāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunallūr peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom keyamāṇi
kkavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvārur kūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār śrīmula[ stāṉamu] ṭaiyār koyilil rājanārāyaṇan tirumaṇṭa(ṭa)pattu nāṅkaḷ kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntu Ikkoyil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevaṟkku viṟṟukkuṭutta kuḷattukku
poruḷmāvaṟuti . jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇavil koṭṭattu Arumpāk kiḻān maturāntakan ponnampalakkūttanān poṟ(ṟa)koyil toṇṭaimānār Iddevaṟku ceṅkaḻunīr tiruppaḷḷittāmam cātti Aruḷukai
kku kuḷaṅkoḷḷa Idevar śrībhaṇṭārattu Oṭukkin kācu100 Ikkācu nūṟukkum rāja rājanmāṭaiyo ṭokkum cempon muppattirukaḻañcaraikkum nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta kuḷamāvatu Eṅkaḷuril neṭuṅkuḷamenṟu perkūvappaṭṭa kuḷam viṟṟu poruḷ māvaṟu
ti ceytu kuṭuppataṟku kiḻpāṟkellai Ūrilninṟum vaṭakki nokki ponta peru vaḻikkum viḷākattil nāṟṟaṅkālkaḷukkum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya Ulokamādevi viṇṇakarāḻvār tirunandavanattukku meṟku tenpāṟkellai Idadevar tirunan
davanattukkum śrīkaiyilāsamuṭaiyār tirunandavanattukkum piṭāriyār śrīkoyilukkum tirumuṟṟattukkum pāṇṭināṭṭu ceri koppaṭṭaṅkaḷ Innāḷ varai Anupavittu varukiṟa nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Irājentiraco
ḻan vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ivvāy(k*)kālukkum perum peccār Utaiyan nārāyaṇan kaṇṇapirān bhaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyan nārāyaṇan paḷḷikoṇṭān bhaṭṭanum śrīkṛṣṇancirāmabhaṭṭanum parantāman caṅkaranārāyaṇaThe remaining portion is built in.n cidhara bhaṭṭanum Ā
ttiraiyan perumpuṟakkaṭal [ cidi] vākara bhaṭṭanum pūcāḷi śrīkṛṣṇabhaṭṭaṉum bhaṭṭanum gautaman Ātittan pavanāji bhaṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku teṟkum Āka Iv vicainta perunānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭanilam Iraṇṭemukkāle cinnam Innilam
Iraṇṭe mukkāle cinnamum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koṇṭa Anṟāṭu naṟpon muppattiru kaḻañcaraiyināl kācu 100 Ikkācu nūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaiccella Aṟakkoṇṭu poruḷmāvaṟuticeytu kuṭuttom Iv Āti caṇḍeśvaradevaṟku Ittirunallūr pe
ruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Ipporuḷmāvaṟuti Eḻutinen Ittiru nallūr karaṇattān nalmārakkamaṅkalamuṭaiyān maticūtan tillaivanamuṭaiyāneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai bhāradvāji kūttāṭi centapirānbhaṭṭa neḻuttu Itu bhāradvāji śrīkṛṣṇan cirā
yijñaiyātamaik paṇiyāl mārakkamaṅkalamuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ippaṭikku bhāradvāji kaṇṇan Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku yān sayijñaiyātamaikku kaṇṇan Aḻakiya maṇavāḷan Eḻuttu Itu kaviṇiyan śrī kṛṣṇa
Digital edition of SII 17.608 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
